_note: Curated Open5e reskins for mystery. Grounded suspects-and-secrets renames over real stat blocks; cr denormalized and verified by scripts/test-bestiary.mjs.

entries.name: Dockside Rat
entries.blurb: bold vermin of the warehouse quarter

entries.name: Hired Rough
entries.blurb: somebody paid him to discourage questions

entries.name: Constable
entries.blurb: on the beat, possibly on the take

entries.name: Secret Society Member
entries.blurb: the ring on his finger matches the seal

entries.name: Belligerent Heir
entries.blurb: stands to inherit, quick with a cane-sword

entries.name: Rival Investigator
entries.blurb: always one step ahead or behind

entries.name: Loan Shark's Muscle
entries.blurb: collects debts and silence

entries.name: Sewer Waif
entries.blurb: sees everything under the streets, bites

entries.name: The Walled-Up Victim
entries.blurb: the renovation found more than dry rot

entries.name: The Exhumed
entries.blurb: the coroner's mistake walks

entries.name: Estate Hound
entries.blurb: loosed on trespassers after dark

entries.name: Parish Curate
entries.blurb: heard a confession he should not have

entries.name: The Follower
entries.blurb: always at the edge of the gaslight

entries.name: Poacher-Turned-Informant
entries.blurb: knows the grounds and the alibis

entries.name: Foreign Legionnaire
entries.blurb: deserter with a soldier's discipline

entries.name: Prizefighter
entries.blurb: the club's undefeated, and someone's alibi

entries.name: The Resurrection Man
entries.blurb: sells cadavers, samples the merchandise

entries.name: The Study's Chill
entries.blurb: the murder room refuses to warm

entries.name: The Patron's Errand-Thing
entries.blurb: someone respectable keeps unrespectable help

entries.name: Conservatory Horror
entries.blurb: the professor's specimen got loose

entries.name: The Hall Suit
entries.blurb: the servants refuse to dust it

entries.name: The Opera Ghost
entries.blurb: her aria empties the balcony seats

entries.name: The Moor Hound
entries.blurb: the legend the family dreads

entries.name: Smuggling Ring Leader
entries.blurb: runs the coast trade and the town council

entries.name: Society Grandmaster
entries.blurb: the lodge's inner room has an altar

entries.name: The Asylum Escapee
entries.blurb: the file says he had accomplices

entries.name: The Informant
entries.blurb: feeds secrets to every side, literally rat-faced

entries.name: The Locked Chest
entries.blurb: the will said never to open it

entries.name: The Marsh Lantern
entries.blurb: three witnesses followed it; none returned

entries.name: The Bishop's Fixer
entries.blurb: the church settles scandals its own way

entries.name: The Courthouse Grotesque
entries.blurb: perched above the scales of justice, listening

entries.name: The Harbor Witch
entries.blurb: sells tide-charts and curses at the quay

entries.name: The Crypt Dweller
entries.blurb: the mausoleum lock is broken from inside

entries.name: The Impostor
entries.blurb: the deceased was seen at breakfast

entries.name: The Fortune Teller
entries.blurb: her predictions keep coming true

entries.name: The Family Curse
entries.blurb: the estate's locked wing, explained

entries.name: The Disinherited
entries.blurb: cut from the will, returned from the grave

entries.name: The Impossible Intruder
entries.blurb: locked room, no windows, web in the corner

entries.name: The Expedition's Cargo
entries.blurb: the museum's new acquisition, and the deaths since

entries.name: The Colonel
entries.blurb: his service record has a redacted year

entries.name: The Duelist Baronet
entries.blurb: settles disputes at dawn, permanently

entries.name: The Hound of the Fen
entries.blurb: burning eyes, and a paw print in the flowerbed

entries.name: The Sculptor's Secret
entries.blurb: his statues are too lifelike to sell

entries.name: The Menagerie Escape
entries.blurb: the circus says it lost nothing

entries.name: The Ferryman Brothers
entries.blurb: conjoined twins who run the night crossing

entries.name: The First Wife
entries.blurb: the portrait's eyes follow the second

entries.name: The Salon Hostess
entries.blurb: her guests confess everything eventually

entries.name: The Blackmailer
entries.blurb: knows what everyone did, was there for most of it

entries.name: The Gamekeeper
entries.blurb: the estate's accidents cluster around him

entries.name: The Undercroft Tenant
entries.blurb: the landlord's arrangement predates the deed

entries.name: The Night Clerk
entries.blurb: works only the graveyard shift, never ages

entries.name: The Judge's Shade
entries.blurb: hangs about the gallows he once fed

entries.name: The Governess
entries.blurb: the children's nightmares started with her

entries.name: The Surgeon's Assistant
entries.blurb: the clinic's night porter, heavily scarred

entries.name: The Ring Champion
entries.blurb: the betting syndicate's unbeatable man

entries.name: The Unseen Burglar
entries.blurb: impossible thefts, windows locked from inside

entries.name: The Veiled Heiress
entries.blurb: no suitor has ever returned twice

entries.name: The Consulting Occultist
entries.blurb: solves cases the police cannot file

entries.name: The Foreign Gentleman
entries.blurb: arrived with the fog, collects debts of flesh

entries.name: The Clockwork Butler
entries.blurb: obeys the amulet, wherever it now is

entries.name: The Poisoner
entries.blurb: three inheritances, one common caterer

entries.name: The Opera Cloak
entries.blurb: the costume room's oldest piece

entries.name: The Séance Spirit
entries.blurb: the medium's contact has its own agenda

entries.name: The Creditor
entries.blurb: the family fortune's true source calls it due

entries.name: The Foundry Watchman
entries.blurb: never signed a contract, never leaves

entries.name: The Thing in the Cistern
entries.blurb: the water company's oldest secret

entries.name: The Museum Guardian
entries.blurb: the east wing exhibit guards itself

entries.name: The Puppetmaster
entries.blurb: every thread in town runs to one hand

entries.name: The Untouchable Magnate
entries.blurb: acquitted four times; the witnesses vanish

entries.name: The Patriarch
entries.blurb: the family fortune began with his portrait

entries.name: The Founder in the Vault
entries.blurb: the bank's charter forbids opening level nine
